title: Race Against Time: The CIA and 9/11
original_title: Race Against Time: The CIA and 9/11
overview: Follows former top officials and elite operatives inside the CIA as they share accounts of their efforts to stop Osama bin Laden and the catastrophic attack they knew was coming.
